leadText: Take Down (Japanese: とっしん Charge) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It was TM09 in Generation I, and is TM001 in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generation II onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Take Down inflicts damage, and the user receives recoil damage equal to ¼ of the damage done to the target. If the user of Take Down attacks first and faints due to recoil damage, the opponent will not attack or be subjected to recurrent damage during that round. Self-inflicted recoil damage from Take Down from the previous turn can be countered if the opponent does not make a move on the following turn. If Take Down breaks a substitute, the user will take no recoil damage. In Stadium, no recoil damage is taken if Take Down knocks out an opponent. Generation II onwards [ edit | edit source ] The user now receives recoil damage even if a substitute breaks. Take Down can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 6 bonus appeal points if Focus Energy or Harden was used in the previous turn. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 90 108 Cooldown 8s Move wind-up time 15 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect Recoil 25% — — Damages the user by a percentage of damage dealt.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 A charging attack. One quarter of the damage it inflicts comes back to hurt the attacker. G S C A tackle that also hurts the user. R S E Colo XD A reckless charge attack that also hurts the user. FR LG A reckless, full-body charge attack that also hurts the user a little. D P Pt HG SS PBR A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the foe. It also damages the user a little. B W B2 W2 A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. It also damages the user a little. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little. S V A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little. ZA The user attacks by slamming into targets in an all-out charge. The user will also take some damage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target, but also hurts the user. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, but it also hurts the user. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえるが じぶんも ダメージをうけてしまう MD GtI It damages an enemy, but you receive recoil damage, too. S MD It damages an enemy, but you'll receive recoil damage, too. MD RT DX It damages an enemy—but you'll receive recoil damage, too.
